description: Lock antimatter_rockets to matter-antimatter annihilation rocket propulsion rather than fusion-rocket or generalized force-field architectures.

checks.reason: Antimatter rockets require production, storage, extraction, and delivery of antimatter to the engine.
The node represents rocket propulsion using antimatter annihilation to produce thrust.
NASA antimatter propulsion concepts require shielding, radiators, support structures, magnetic nozzles, and other demanding vehicle materials.
Fusion rockets are not prerequisite to antimatter annihilation rockets broadly; they are only relevant to some hybrid antimatter-catalyzed concepts.
NASA sources support specific magnetic and shielding systems, not a broad force-field prerequisite.
